description_long: This object is a stylized coconut palm tree with a thick, segmented trunk composed of alternating light and dark brown bands. The top of the trunk supports a dense canopy of large, flat, polygonal green fronds radiating outward in a circular pattern, each frond made up of multiple angular leaflets. Nestled among the fronds, several round, tan coconuts are visible, clustered near the center of the foliage. The overall appearance is blocky and geometric, with sharp edges and a low-polygon aesthetic reminiscent of voxel art. The trunk is straight and vertical, while the fronds arch outward, creating a broad, umbrella-like crown. The colors are vivid, with a strong contrast between the green leaves and the brown trunk and coconuts.
description: A stylized coconut palm tree with a segmented brown trunk, broad green fronds, and several tan coconuts clustered at the top. The design is blocky and geometric, with vivid colors and a low-polygon look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central trunk, radiating green fronds, and coconuts clustered at the top center.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the right-side fronds and the coconuts nestled among the leaves.
description_view_2: Rear view with the trunk partially obscured by the dense fronds, coconuts still visible at the crown.
description_view_3: Left-side view highlighting the spread of the fronds and the coconuts peeking through the foliage.
attribute_husk_pattern: The coconut husks are smooth and uniformly tan, with no visible fiber texture or markings. The surface appears clean and untextured, lacking the typical fibrous pattern of real coconuts.
attribute_growth_cluster: Cluster of coconuts; approximately three coconuts are visible, grouped closely together at the top of the trunk among the fronds.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The coconuts are attached directly to the top of a palm tree, nestled among the fronds.
attribute_urban_placement: Indeterminate; the background is plain white with no contextual clues to indicate an urban or natural environment.
